demo.title: zerion-portfolio.sh
demo.code:
# Get full portfolio via API key
curl "https://api.zerion.io/v1/wallets/0x.../portfolio?currency=usd" \
  -H "Authorization: Basic $(echo -n $ZERION_API_KEY: | base64)"

# Or pay-per-request with x402 (no account needed)
zerion-cli wallet portfolio 0x... --x402

# All token + DeFi positions
zerion-cli wallet positions 0x...

# PnL tracking (realized, unrealized, per-asset)
zerion-cli wallet pnl 0x...

# Full transaction history with human-readable types
zerion-cli wallet transactions 0x...

setup: Option A (no signup): use x402 — pay $0.01 USDC per request on Base
Option B (free key): get API key instantly at dashboard.zerion.io
Set `ZERION_API_KEY` env var, then run `zerion-cli wallet analyze 0x...`
